[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#080f18″ use_background_color_gradient=”on” background_color_gradient_direction=”90deg” background_color_gradient_stops=”#000000 0%|#071441 100%” custom_padding=”20px||||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”1″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” width=”90%” max_width=”2560px” custom_padding=”50px||50px||false|false” custom_css_main_element=”display: flex;||align-items: center;||” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.24.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” header_text_align=”center” header_2_font=”Aptos||||||||” header_2_text_align=”center” header_2_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_2_font_size=”50px” module_alignment=”center” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” header_font=”–et_global_heading_font||||||||” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_font_size=”50px” header_font_size_tablet=”45px” header_font_size_phone=”40px” header_font_size_last_edited=”on|tablet” sticky_enabled=”0″]

Privacy Statements (EU)

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” positioning=”none” z_index=”2″ custom_margin=”|20px||20px|false|true” custom_margin_tablet=”|20px||20px|false|true” custom_margin_phone=”|10px||10px|false|true” custom_margin_last_edited=”on|phone” border_radii=”off|15px|15px||” border_radii_tablet=”on||||” border_radii_phone=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_radii_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” width=”90%” width_phone=”90%” width_last_edited=”off|desktop” max_width=”2560px” custom_margin=”||40px||false|false” custom_padding=”30px|0px|30px|0px|true|true” custom_padding_tablet=”30px|30px|30px|30px|true|true” custom_padding_phone=”20px|20px|20px|20px|true|true” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”rgba(100,116,139,0.3)” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-3e745b50-5208-42d4-956a-2f73fba491de%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}” width__hover_enabled=”off|desktop”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_css_main_element=”display:flex;||flex-direction:column;||margin: auto” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Aptos||||||||” text_text_color=”#000000″ text_line_height=”1.3em” width_tablet=”” width_phone=”100%” width_last_edited=”on|desktop” max_width=”100%” max_width_tablet=”100%” max_width_phone=”100%” max_width_last_edited=”on|phone” module_alignment=”left” custom_margin=”||40px||false|false” text_font_size_tablet=”18px” text_font_size_phone=”16px” text_font_size_last_edited=”off|desktop” global_colors_info=”{}”]

This privacy statement was last updated on June 3, 2021 and applies to citizens and legal permanent residents of the European Economic Area.

In this privacy statement, we explain what we do with the data we obtain about you via https://www.ami.com. We recommend you carefully read this statement. In our processing we comply with the requirements of privacy legislation. That means, among other things, that:

  • we clearly state the purposes for which we process personal data. We do this by means of this privacy statement;
  • we aim to limit our collection of personal data to only the personal data required for legitimate purposes;
  • we first request your explicit consent to process your personal data in cases requiring your consent;
  • we take appropriate security measures to protect your personal data and also require this from parties that process personal data on our behalf;
  • we respect your right to access your personal data or have it corrected or deleted, at your request.

If you have any questions, or want to know exactly what data we keep of you, please contact us.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_toggle title=”1. Purpose, data and retention period” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

We may collect or receive personal information for a number of purposes connected with our business operations which may include the following:

1.1 Contact – Through phone, mail, email and/or webforms

For this purpose we use the following data:

  • Name, Address and City
  • Email address
  • Username, passwords and other account specific data
  • IP Address
  • Location
  • Visitor behavior
  • Telephone number

1.2 Compiling and analyzing statistics for website improvement.

For this purpose we use the following data:

  • Name, Address and City
  • Email address
  • IP Address
  • Location
  • Visitor behavior

The basis on which we may process these data is:

Consent obtained

Retention period

Upon termination of the service we retain this data for the following period: unlimited.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”2. Sharing with other parties” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

We only share or disclose this data to processors for the following purposes:

Processors

Name: HubSpot
Country: United States
Purpose: Direct contact form fill data

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”3. Cookies” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]Our website uses cookies. For more information about cookies, please refer to our Cookie Policy. The inclusion of full IP addresses is blocked by us.[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”4. Security” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]We are committed to the security of personal data. We take appropriate security measures to limit abuse of and unauthorized access to personal data. This ensures that only the necessary persons have access to your data, that access to the data is protected, and that our security measures are regularly reviewed.[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”5. Third-party websites” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

This privacy statement does not apply to third-party websites connected by links on our website. We cannot guarantee that these third parties handle your personal data in a reliable or secure manner. We recommend you read the privacy statements of these websites prior to making use of these websites.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”6. Amendments to this privacy statement” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

We reserve the right to make amendments to this privacy statement. It is recommended that you consult this privacy statement regularly in order to be aware of any changes. In addition, we will actively inform you wherever possible.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”7. Accessing and modifying your data” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

If you have any questions or want to know which personal data we have about you, please contact us. You can contact us by using the information below. You have the following rights:

  • You have the right to know why your personal data is needed, what will happen to it, and how long it will be retained for.
  • Right of access: You have the right to access your personal data that is known to us.
  • Right to rectification: you have the right to supplement, correct, have deleted or blocked your personal data whenever you wish.
  • If you give us your consent to process your data, you have the right to revoke that consent and to have your personal data deleted.
  • Right to transfer your data: you have the right to request all your personal data from the controller and transfer it in its entirety to another controller.
  • Right to object: you may object to the processing of your data. We comply with this, unless there are justified grounds for processing.

Please make sure to always clearly state who you are, so that we can be certain that we do not modify or delete any data of the wrong person.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”8. Submitting a complaint” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

If you are not satisfied with the way in which we handle (a complaint about) the processing of your personal data, you have the right to submit a complaint to the Data Protection Authority.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”9. Data Protection Officer” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Our Data Protection Officer has been registered with the data protection authority in an EU Member State. If you have any questions or requests with respect to this privacy statement or for the Data Protection Officer, please send an email to privacy@ami.com.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”10. Contact details” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

AMI US Holdings, Inc.
3095 Satellite Boulevard
Building 800, Suite 425
Duluth, Georgia 30096
United States
Website: https://www.ami.com
Email: privacy@ami.com
Phone number: +1 770 246-8600

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”WPML” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

WPML uses cookies to identify the visitor’s current language, the last visited language and the language of users who have logged in. While you use the plugin, WPML will share data regarding the site through Installer. No data from the user itself will be shared.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”WP Job Manager” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

This site adds the following cookies to help users resume job submissions that they have started but have not completed: wp-job-manager-submitting-job-id and wp-job-manager-submitting-job-key

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”WPML Media Translation” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

WPML Media Translation will send the email address and name of each manager and assigned translator as well as the content itself to Advanced Translation Editor and to the translation services which are used.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”WPML Translation Management” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

WPML Translation Management will send the email address and name of each manager and assigned translator as well as the content itself to Advanced Translation Editor and to the translation services which are used.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”WPML String Translation” open_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”5||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”20px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”2||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”20px” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”Aptos|500|||||||” title_font_size=”22px” closed_title_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.6em” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

WPML String Translation will send all strings to WPML’s Advanced Translation Editor and to the translation services which are used.

[/et_pb_toggle][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
